overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a medieval Gothic castle common room, featuring high vaulted wooden ceilings, red house banners, a burning stone fireplace, and students in robes walking through the warmly lit space. The scene showcases detailed architectural elements including Gothic arched windows and period-appropriate furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle house common room with seating areas and fireplace

agents.ego_description: standing still near the entrance of the common room, observing the surroundings and other students moving through the space

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking from the foreground toward the back of the room near the fireplace

entered.detail: Large stone fireplace with active burning fire and ornate mantle on the left wall
Tall Gothic arched windows with stone tracery allowing natural morning light to enter
Red and gold fabric banners and tapestries hanging from walls and ceiling beams
Dark leather sofa and armchairs arranged around small tables
Circular wooden table with chairs in the center of the seating area
Crystal ball or glowing blue orb on a pedestal stand in the foreground
Dark exposed wooden trusses and beams supporting the high vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a medieval Gothic common room with warm mixed lighting from a burning fireplace and tall windows. The space features red house banners, leather seating, and wooden architectural elements. A student in robes walks through the center of the room while the camera remains stationary, observing the detailed environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, cinematic observation of a medieval Gothic common room bathed in a warm, atmospheric glow. It begins with a wide view of the space, where the flickering light of a burning stone fireplace blends with the soft illumination streaming through tall arched windows. As the camera holds its position, the focus shifts to the rich textures of red house banners and leather seating set against high vaulted wooden ceilings. The scene concludes as a student in robes walks through the center of the room, their movement adding a sense of life to the detailed architectural environment.
